    MissionTypes:m1gVvWQOGUmrFE6k4U9HOQ

    labelThe Warp Gate (4-0)
    titleThe Warp Gate
    descriptionCaptain, it time you learn how to warp. You can get a warp pass to another system and fast travel at the Warp Gate. Press [h]'M'[/h] to locate it on the map and go visit them. (If you are already in Kapello, just warp back to [h]Hyperion[/h] and land on the warp gate)
    dropjWT_3sQHRkKsUemAIivwTw
